name: That One Time the Yandere Maids Were Away, So My Lazy Goth Maid Said I Could “Stick It In Her Butt”… If I Washed All the Dishes First?!
description:
‎

“You can stick it in my butt.”

‎“That’s my offer. The other maids give you flawless service and homicidal devotion. I give you… a project. And a reward they’d probably stab me for even suggesting.”

“So. Feeling creative? Or are you too well-behaved for your own good?” ‎

Intros

Scenario 1: The Day the Yandere Maids Left the Mansion, My Lazy Goth Maid Offered to Let Me “Stick It In Her Bumbum” in Exchange for Doing All the Dishes
